Panel Guide
Organizations
Organization nodes present in the selected year.
Visible ties
Organization pairs meeting the current minimum shared-row threshold.
Research rows
Cleaned Blue Book person or household listing rows used for analysis.
Membership rows
Person-to-organization links; one listing with two clubs counts twice.
Network density
Share of possible organization pairs that are connected.
Avg degree
Average number of organization ties per organization.
Weighted degree
Total strength of an organization's ties, summing shared rows.
